subject: Re: Q2 renewal terms — a few tweaks
body:
Hi Priya,

Thanks for sending this over. The terms look good overall — one small ask: can we move the review checkpoint from 90 days to 60? Otherwise I'm happy to sign as is.

Best,
Alex

subject: Re: Intro to the finance team
body:
Hi Daniel,

Great to connect — looping in our finance lead now so you two can sort out the invoicing cadence directly. Let me know if anything gets stuck.

Best,
Alex

subject: Re: Vendor onboarding checklist
body:
Hi Marta,

Checklist looks complete on our end. I'll have IT provision access by Friday so onboarding can start Monday as planned. Thanks for staying on top of this.

Best,
Alex

subject: Re: Can we push the kickoff a week?
body:
Hi Jordan,

A week's fine on our side — that actually gives the team more runway to prep. I'll update the calendar invite and send a revised agenda tomorrow.

Best,
Alex

subject: Re: 1:1 notes and follow-ups
body:
Hi Sam,

Good talking today. Recapping the two follow-ups: I'll send the updated deck by Wednesday, and you'll confirm the budget ceiling with your team by Friday. Sound right?

Best,
Alex

subject: Re: Partnerships team intro
body:
Hi Renee,

Thanks for the heads up on the reorg — appreciate you flagging it directly. I'll route future intros through the new structure going forward.

Best,
Alex

subject: Re: SOW milestone clarification
body:
Hi Felix,

Good catch — milestone 2 is 30 days after milestone 1 sign-off, not kickoff. I'll get the SOW language corrected on our end so this doesn't trip up future invoicing.

Best,
Alex

subject: Re: Renewal sign-off
body:
Hi Corinne,

Confirming sign-off on the renewal terms — thanks for flagging the deadline early enough to turn this around. Let me know once it's countersigned.

Best,
Alex

subject: Re: Offsite planning — Wednesday works
body:
Hi Theo,

Wednesday morning works well on my end — let's say 9:30? I'll send a calendar hold and a short agenda beforehand.

Best,
Alex

subject: Re: Compliance training schedule
body:
Hi team,

Thanks for the advance notice — I'll block time on my calendar once the schedule lands. No blockers on my end.

Best,
Alex
